vocab.meaning: kiểm soát hoàn toàn cái gì
vocab.example: I prefer to be the driver because I like to exercise full control over the vehicle's speed and safety.

vocab.meaning: mải mê/đắm chìm vào cái gì
vocab.example: As a passenger, I can be engrossed in a gripping novel or listen to a podcast without any distractions.

vocab.meaning: điều khiển xe vượt qua sự tắc nghẽn
vocab.example: I find it quite therapeutic to navigate through heavy congestion, as it requires my absolute focus.
The best part of being a passenger is the ability to recline the seat and take a nap during a long haul.

vocab.meaning: việc lái xe trên đường cao tốc đơn điệu
vocab.example: I dread monotonous highway driving, so I usually opt to be a passenger whenever we travel across provinces.
Drivers must maintain constant vigilance, which can be mentally draining compared to the leisure of a passenger.

vocab.meaning: Being a backseat observer allows me to capture beautiful photographs of the scenery that the driver might miss.
gánh vác gánh nặng của việc gì
vocab.example: I don't particularly enjoy driving because I don't want to shoulder the burden of everyone's safety on the road.

vocab.meaning: dừng xe theo ý thích bất chợt
vocab.example: When I am the one driving, I have the liberty to stop at a whim whenever I spot an interesting landmark.

vocab.meaning: vị trí làn đường tối ưu
vocab.example: Experienced drivers take pride in their optimal lane positioning to ensure a smooth flow of traffic.
